case_title: CAPITAL ONE BANK VS. MARCO T FLORES et al

docket_entries.description: ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-20-2003 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). THE JUL-11-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF CAPITAL ONE BANK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FLORES, MARCO T $4,803.14 PRINCIPAL, $173.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,976.14, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
